CivicMind AI
PlatformLaunch App
Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash & Google Cloud

Decision Intelligence for
Smarter Communities

A unified AI assistant that understands weather, traffic, air quality, emergencies, and city services to recommend the best daily decisions for citizens.

Google Cloud Architecture

Built on highly scalable Google Cloud Run, Cloud Storage, and BigQuery.

Gemini AI Reasoning

Advanced decision generation using Gemini 2.5 Flash for rapid insight.

Unified Data Pipelines

Real-time aggregation of diverse urban datasets into a single dashboard.

Google Cloud Hackathon Prototype • Built with Next.js & FastAPI
